subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-15
subcodes.first_line: The inhabitants of the world will not become mindful and aware of the bounties and favors of the glorious God; nay rather when these bestowals pour upon them uninterruptedly, their negligence increases in equal ratio.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @unity; oneness of humanity, @light and darkness, @spiritual transformation
